title: Hephaestus Beliefs Workspace Schema
description: Schema for beliefs.yaml — the capacity-limited active workspace of consolidated beliefs. Active capacity: exactly 12 beliefs. Historical evicted/refuted beliefs live in a separate append-only audit ledger. Only the Reflector writes beliefs. Every belief must have a falsifiable kill_criterion.

schema_version.description: Schema version number. Bump when making backward-incompatible changes.

beliefs.description: Active broadcast workspace. Exactly 12 beliefs maximum. Beliefs with status 'evicted' or 'refuted' must be moved to the historical_beliefs array and do not consume this capacity.

statement.description: The belief statement — a falsifiable claim about the codebase or process.

kill_criterion.description: Falsifiable condition that would invalidate this belief. Mandatory — beliefs without kill_criterion are invalid.

confidence.description: Confidence level based on evidence strength.

status.description: Current belief lifecycle status. Only 'active' beliefs count toward the 12-item capacity.

stagnation.description: Number of ticks since this belief last produced a positive outcome. Monotonically increasing while dormant.

momentum.description: Momentum score for this belief. Positive = reinforcing evidence accumulating. Negative = erosion. Zero = neutral.

ttl.description: Time-to-live in ticks. When TTL expires, suspect enforcement ends automatically unless Reflector re-justifies with new evidence.

suspect_age.description: Ticks spent in suspect status. When suspect_age >= TTL, enforcement expires.

cooldown_remaining.description: Ticks remaining in cooldown after a frame shift or ratchet direction change. Zero = not in cooldown. Survives process restart via durable state.

frame_shift_count.description: Number of direction changes within the oscillation window. Used for anti-oscillation hysteresis.

blamed_by.description: Hypothesis IDs whose FAIL has directly propagated blame to this belief. Appended, never duplicated (idempotent).

provenance.description: Provenance trail — records of what evidence/channels created or modified this belief.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence ledger records supporting this belief.

ratchet_audit.description: Audit log of ratchet transitions. Each entry records the direction, notch, verdict_window, and timestamp. Survives restart.

verdict_window.description: Index of the R-verdict window in which this change occurred.

capacity.description: Workspace capacity tracking. The active workspace is capped at 12 beliefs. Historical evicted/refuted beliefs go to historical_beliefs (unbounded).

historical_beliefs.description: Append-only ledger of evicted/refuted beliefs. Does NOT count toward the 12-item active workspace capacity.

narrative.description: One-page bounded causal summary. Rewritten (never append-only) by the Reflector each consolidation cycle. Ledger remains the source of truth. Must cite ledger/hypothesis/belief IDs.
